Home | News

Introducing Claude Opus 4

May 15, 2026

Today we are releasing Claude Opus 4, our most intelligent model.

Capabilities

Claude Opus 4 (claude-opus-4) excels at complex reasoning, code generation, and nuanced analysis. It is available via the Anthropic API and Claude.ai.

Safety

We have conducted extensive safety evaluations. The full system card is available at Claude Opus 4 System Card.

Benchmarks

Claude Opus 4 achieves top scores on GPQA (78.4%), HumanEval (93.2%), and MMLU-Pro (82.1%). These are vendor-reported benchmarks.
